title: GregTech Revival 32x
description: Textures of item, blocks and gui in 32x32 extension for Greg Tech, GregTech, GT
body:
GregTech Revival 32x is a resource pack that improves the textures for the GregTechCEu Modern and GregTech CE Unofficial mods. It makes the game more realistic by increasing the resolution of the textures to 32x32. You can see examples of the textures below.

I recommend using this resource pack with Faithful 32x for the best visual effect.

Credits:
- Faithful32 Modded: This resource pack was based on the textures for GregTech from Faithful32 Modded.
- Faithful 32x: Some textures from this pack were based on textures from Faithful 32x
- And some textures were from this resource pack. - https://github.com/marisathewitch/Faithful32-GTCEu


You may also be interested in:
Improved Applied Energistics 2 - 32x32 resource pack for Applied Energistics 2
ILAORE's TFC 32x - 32x32 resource pack for TerraFirmaCraft.


Official Faithful Website - [https://faithfulpack.net/](https://faithfulpack.net/)
